{"step_by_step_thinking": "Escitalopram is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) and is known to have several common adverse effects, including sexual dysfunction (anorgasmia), gastrointestinal issues (nausea), and neurological effects (vivid dreaming and dizziness).
